description: A news article from a media outlet, representing the raw published content before any AI enrichment.

main.description: A news article scraped from an RSS feed or website.

title.description: Original headline of the article as published by the source.

url.description: Canonical URL of the article on the source website.

source.description: Strong reference to the tech.transparencia.news.source record for this outlet.

description.description: Article summary or lead paragraph, typically from the RSS feed description field.

imageUrl.description: URL of the article's featured image.

guid.description: Original GUID from the RSS feed, used for deduplication.

publishedAt.description: When the article was published by the source.

createdAt.description: When this record was created in the AT Protocol network.

language.description: Language of the article content (BCP-47, e.g., 'es', 'en', 'pt-BR').
